description_long: This sculpture depicts a young child, possibly a girl, dressed in an elaborate, voluminous gown with detailed folds and textures. The figure stands on a rectangular plinth, with the front of the dress adorned with intricate floral or ornamental elements, and the hands positioned in front, one holding a small object. The facial features are rounded and cherubic, with curly hair framing the face. The back of the sculpture shows the gown cascading down in heavy, textured layers, and the overall form is solid and robust. The base of the sculpture bears an inscription, suggesting a commemorative or artistic context.
description: A detailed sculpture of a child in an ornate gown, standing on a rectangular plinth with visible inscription and intricate dress textures.
description_view_0: Front view showing the child's face, hands, and the elaborate front of the gown with visible inscription on the plinth.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the layered folds of the gown and the profile of the child's face.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full volume and texture of the gown, with the back of the head and shoulders visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile of the face and the detailed drapery of the gown.
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is mounted on a stone plinth, suggesting an outdoor or public installation, possibly in a plaza or park.
